decision: FeedbackCategory declared as a string-literal union in the reference module (not inline in the model, not a TS enum), with CATEGORY_OPTIONS carrying subjectPrefix per row.
alternative_not_taken: Declaring the union inline in FeedbackSubmission.ts — rejected because it would split the category set across two files (model owns the discriminator, reference owns labels/prefixes), creating two sources of truth for which categories exist.
rationale: Reference module is the single source of the category set (values + labels + prefixes), matching the PROVIDER_OPTIONS precedent and CONVENTIONS 1.2/6.10. The model imports the type from reference; reference imports nothing — dependency direction preserved.
